name: Deel
description: Deel is a global HR and payroll platform for hiring and paying remote workers in 150+ countries. The API lets you manage contracts, process payments, handle compliance, and run global payroll for both employees and independent contractors without setting up local entities.

capabilities.name: list_contracts
capabilities.description: Retrieve all contracts across your organization, filterable by type (employee, contractor), status, and country.

capabilities.name: create_contract
capabilities.description: Create a new employment or contractor agreement. Specify compensation, currency, scope of work, and country-specific compliance details.

capabilities.name: list_people
capabilities.description: Retrieve all workers (employees and contractors) in your Deel organization with their profile details and contract status.

capabilities.name: create_invoice_adjustment
capabilities.description: Add a bonus, expense reimbursement, or other payment adjustment to a contractor's next invoice cycle.

capabilities.name: list_payments
capabilities.description: Retrieve payment history across all contracts, including amounts, currencies, payment dates, and statuses.

capabilities.name: submit_timesheet
capabilities.description: Submit time tracking entries for a contractor or employee. Records hours worked for a given date range.

capabilities.name: offboard_worker
capabilities.description: Initiate the offboarding process for an employee or terminate a contractor agreement with proper compliance handling.
